name: alphafold-sovereign-mcp
description: MCP server wrapping AlphaFold DB and 13 other biomedical data sources behind a set of MCP tool calls; persists each result to a local SQLite knowledge graph for later querying.
status_note: v1.1.0-rc1 ships with engineering-grade tests (610 tests, 99% branch coverage) but its scientific outputs (ACMG draft, druggability tier) have NOT been validated by independent domain experts. See STATUS.md and LIMITATIONS.md.

from_source.command: git clone https://github.com/smaniches/alphafold-sovereign-mcp && cd alphafold-sovereign-mcp && uv pip install -e .
